perturbation.original_text: The undersigned Prospective Investor (“Investor”) is executing this Agreement as of _____________________,20__, in conne ction with the distribution of certain confidential information relative to the possible retail/c ommercial development site (the "Development") offered by (“Owne r”).
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned Prospective Purchaser (“Investor”) is executing this Agreement as of _____________________,20__, in conne ction with the distribution of certain confidential information relative to the possible retail/c ommercial development site (the "Development") offered by (“Owne r”).
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Investor' to 'Purchaser' in the first line, while retaining 'Investor' throughout the rest of the document, introduces ambiguity. The document later refers to the obligations of the 'Investor,' creating confusion as to whether these obligations also apply to a 'Purchaser.'
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis. The Investor also agrees to inform all such employees, representatives, consultants, and agents of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, to provide them with a copy of this Agreement, to obtain their agreement to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and to take such other action as may be reasonably necessary to cause such employees to comply with these confidentiality provisions. Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property. The Investor agrees to be fully respons ible for any breach of this Agreement caused by such employees, representatives, co nsultants, and agents.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Investor' with 'Purchaser' in the initial definition, while the contradicted text consistently refers to 'Investor' and their obligations, such as keeping information confidential. This creates a misalignment of terminology, as the contradicted section assumes the party is an 'Investor,' but the changed text redefines them as a 'Purchaser' initially, leading to ambiguity about whether the obligations apply to the 'Purchaser,' thus resulting in a strong in-text contradiction as defined by Misaligned Terminology.

perturbation.original_text: Any and all information, including but not limited to, location, financial information, title reports, surveys, and other agreements, documents, materials and oral and/or written information with respec t to the Property, whether delivered or made available concurrently with this Agreement or to be deliv ered in the future (collectively, the Confidential Information") shall be subject to the terms of this Ag reement
perturbation.changed_text: Any and all data, including but not limited to, location, financial information, title reports, surveys, and other agreements, documents, materials and oral and/or written information with respec t to the Property, whether delivered or made available concurrently with this Agreement or to be deliv ered in the future (collectively, the Confidential Information") shall be subject to the terms of this Ag reement
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'information' with 'data' introduces a potential contradiction. While 'data' can be a subset of 'information', it isn't explicitly defined as such in the agreement. The contradiction occurs because the agreement later refers to 'Confidential Information' obligations without clarifying if these also apply to all forms of 'data'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Confidential Information shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. If the Investor elects not to proceed with the Development, or if the undersi gned is informed that the Property is no longe r available for purchase or if the Investor is otherwise requested by the Owne r to return the Confidential Information, the Investor will promptly return all Confi dential Information (and all reproduc tions or destroy electronic copies thereof if any);
perturbation.justification: The change from 'information' to 'data' in the Changed Text introduces a strong contradiction with the Contradicted Text. The Contradicted Text refers specifically to 'Confidential Information,' and the modified definition now uses 'data' instead of 'information.' This misalignment creates uncertainty regarding whether the obligations related to 'Confidential Information' in the Contradicted Text also apply to 'data'. Since the agreement doesn't explicitly define 'data' as a subset of 'information,' it's unclear if 'data' falls under the purview of the Confidential Information obligations, therefore leading to an in-text contradiction, specifically a case of Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: With respect to the Confidentia l Information, the Investor agrees as follows: 1. NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis.
perturbation.changed_text: With respect to the Protected Data, the Investor agrees as follows: 1. NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Confidential Information' to 'Protected Data' only in the introductory sentence of Section 1 creates a contradiction. The section then proceeds to detail obligations related to 'Confidential Information,' but it's now unclear if these obligations also apply to 'Protected Data,' or if the 'Protected Data' has specific, different handling instructions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis. The Investor also agrees to inform all such employees, representatives, consultants, and agents of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, to provide them with a copy of this Agreement, to obtain their agreement to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and to take such other action as may be reasonably necessary to cause such employees to comply with these confidentiality provisions. Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property. The Investor agrees to be fully respons ible for any breach of this Agreement caused by such employees, representatives, co nsultants, and agents.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Protected Data' in the introductory sentence of Section 1, while the rest of the section, including the contradicted text, continues to refer to 'Confidential Information.' This creates a contradiction because it becomes unclear whether the obligations outlined in the contradicted text, which explicitly pertain to 'Confidential Information,' also apply to 'Protected Data.' This misalignment of terminology, as defined in the 'Misaligned Terminology' perturbation type, leads to conflicting obligations and uncertainty, therefore 'YES'.

perturbation.original_text: Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis.
perturbation.changed_text: Investor shall keep the Confidential Materials permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'Confidential Information' with 'Confidential Materials' at the beginning of the sentence in Section 1 creates a contradiction. The sentence then reverts to using 'Confidential Information,' creating confusion: Are Investor's obligations related to Confidential Information different to the obligations related to Confidential Materials, or are they one and the same?
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Materials permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis. The Investor also agrees to inform all such employees, representatives, consultants, and agents of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, to provide them with a copy of this Agreement, to obtain their agreement to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and to take such other action as may be reasonably necessary to cause such employees to comply with these confidentiality provisions. Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property. The Investor agrees to be fully respons ible for any breach of this Agreement caused by such employees, representatives, co nsultants, and agents.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Confidential Materials' at the beginning of the sentence. However, the sentence then reverts to using 'Confidential Information,' creating a contradiction. The Contradicted Text also uses both terms and could be interpreted as using them interchangeably. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' which states this type of contradiction occurs when the contract uses multiple terms interchangeably without defining them, leading to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Confidential Information shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. If the Investor elects not to proceed with the Development, or if the undersi gned is informed that the Property is no longe r available for purchase or if the Investor is otherwise requested by the Owne r to return the Confidential Information, the Investor will promptly return all Confi dential Information (and all reproduc tions or destroy electronic copies thereof if any);
perturbation.changed_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Proprietary Data shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. If the Investor elects not to proceed with the Development, or if the undersi gned is informed that the Property is no longe r available for purchase or if the Investor is otherwise requested by the Owne r to return the Confidential Information, the Investor will promptly return all Confi dential Information (and all reproduc tions or destroy electronic copies thereof if any);
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Confidential Information' to 'Proprietary Data' at the beginning of Section 2 creates a contradiction. The section continues to state that Investor should return 'Confidential Information', so which set of data does Investor need to return?
perturbation.contradicted_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Proprietary Data shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. If the Investor elects not to proceed with the Development, or if the undersi gned is informed that the Property is no longe r available for purchase or if the Investor is otherwise requested by the Owne r to return the Confidential Information, the Investor will promptly return all Confi dential Information (and all reproduc tions or destroy electronic copies thereof if any);
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Confidential Information' to 'Proprietary Data' in the Changed Text, while the remainder of the section still refers to 'Confidential Information', creates a direct conflict. This aligns with the Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction definition, as it introduces multiple terms for the same or related data without clear definition, leading to confusion about which information the Investor is obligated to return. The Contradicted Text is the same as the changed text, but this doesn't mean there is no contradiction. The contradiction is introduced because the Changed Text itself refers to both Proprietary Data and Confidential Information, creating an in-text contradiction about which data should be returned. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: All unwritten Confidential Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement in perpetuity.
perturbation.changed_text: All unwritten Restricted Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement in perpetuity.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Confidential Information' to 'Restricted Information' only in the final sentence of section 5. It leaves the document defining what is confidential information, and what is the difference between Confidential and Restricted information
perturbation.contradicted_text: All written Confidential Information and any copies thereof in the Investor's possession or the possession of the Investor's employees or agents, including, without limitation, that portion of the Confidential Information that may be found in analyses, compilations, studies or other documents prepared by or for the Investor , shall be returned to Owne r promptly upon its request. All unwritten Restricted Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement in perpetuity.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Restricted Information' in the Changed Text, while the Contradicted Text contains both terms: 'Confidential Information' and 'Restricted Information'. The Perturbation Explanation states that the document defines what is confidential information, and what is the difference between Confidential and Restricted information, causing a contradiction because the terms are used in conjunction without a clear definition after the change. The Contradicted Text uses them together, further emphasizing the contradiction.
